OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Include Players who Left Game in Scoreboard
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Include Players who Left Game in Scoreboard

OptionDescription.SourceString: Determines whether to include players who left the game in the scoreboard. If there are more than 50 players who left, players will be removed from scoreboard after 15 minutes until there are 50 again.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Determines whether to include players who left the game in the scoreboard. If there are more than 50 players who left, players will be removed from scoreboard after 15 minutes until there are 50 again.
